{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Elder Intent
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Elder Intent]] is a presence in the air that [[Estyr]] wants to clear.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
